functional_requirements.requirement: Small and medium scale sellers can list their products in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

functional_requirements.requirement: Sellers can showcase their products in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

functional_requirements.requirement: Sellers can advertise their products in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

functional_requirements.requirement: Customers can view all the products available from various sellers in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can view all the products available from various sellers and buy those products.

functional_requirements.requirement: Customers can purchase products online through the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: It also facilitates online payments for purchasing the products.

functional_requirements.requirement: Customers can rate or give a review for the product in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can rate or give a review for the product and seller.

functional_requirements.requirement: Customers can report a seller for any violations in delivery or if the product does not meet the specified requirement in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can also report a seller for any violations in delivery or if the product does not meet the specified requirement.

functional_requirements.requirement: Customers can view the contact information and rating of the seller before buying the product in the application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can also view the contact information and the rating of the seller before buying the product (Figures 9.1–9.9).

functional_requirements.requirement: Sellers can easily authenticate and signup to the portal.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: New sellers can easily authenticate and signup to the portal and sell their products in the portal.

functional_requirements.requirement: The application offers separate login for sellers and customers.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The application offers separate login for sellers and customers, where the sellers and customers can sign in and start using the application.

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
Various new small scale and medium scale sellers face difficulties to reach out to the customers and
sell their products along with other competing products in the market. This increases their overall
cost, thus reducing their profit or even causing loss. E-Retail is an online marketplace application
case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store. E-Retail aims in providing a dynamic
platform for all small and medium scale sellers to reach out and sell their products directly to
all range of customers at a competing price without the need of any physical store. This enables
the sellers to eliminate the cost of rent or maintenance of a physical store and to minimize other
related costs. It also aims in promoting direct communication between the seller and customer,
hence providing a trusted relationship between them. New sellers can easily authenticate and
signup to the portal and sell their products in the portal. The application offers separate login for
sellers and customers, where the sellers and customers can sign in and start using the application.
Customers can view all the products available from various sellers and buy those products. It also
facilitates online payments for purchasing the products. Customers can rate or give a review for the
product and seller. Customers can also report a seller for any violations in delivery or if the product
does not meet the specified requirement. Customers can also view the contact information and the
rating of the seller before buying the product (Figures 9.1–9.9).
>>>
